pr.title: gr: fix Zebes Route param store
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: Fixed the Zebes Route ground module's modeling of grZe_Route_804D6A60 by replacing an anonymous pointer-style struct with an explicit 8-byte param-store object containing a params pointer and padding. Named the currently understood route parameters as camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance, updated users to access grZe_Route_804D6A60.params, and brought grzebesroute data sections, including .sbss, to 100% while leaving known function/TU fuzzy mismatches unchanged.
what_changed: Added grZebesRoute_Params with named int fields camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance.
Added grZebesRoute_ParamStore with a grZebesRoute_Params* params field and a u32 pad field, modeling grZe_Route_804D6A60 as an 8-byte store rather than just a pointer.
Changed grZe_Route_804D6A60 from a static anonymous pointer type with x0/x4 fields to a concrete grZebesRoute_ParamStore object.
Updated initialization in grZebesRoute_8020B164 so Ground_801C49F8() is stored into grZe_Route_804D6A60.params.
Updated zako spawn logic in grZebesRoute_8020B1F4 to read grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->zako_spawn_chance instead of grZe_Route_804D6A60->x4.
Updated ground object setup in grZebesRoute_8020B3C0 to set gp->gv.zebes2.xC4 from grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->camera_timer instead of grZe_Route_804D6A60->x0.
smart_moves: Modeled the symbol's storage shape separately from the pointed-to parameter block, which fixed the data-section representation without pretending the global itself was the parameter struct.
Kept unknown storage explicit with a u32 pad field in grZebesRoute_ParamStore, preserving the observed 8-byte size while avoiding overnaming unsupported fields.

Named only the route parameters that were behaviorally supported by call sites: camera_timer is consumed when assigning gp->gv.zebes2.xC4, and zako_spawn_chance is passed to HSD_Randi for spawn chance behavior.
Documented verification and remaining non-perfect fuzzy matches so the PR's scope was clearly limited to data sections rather than claiming full TU/function matching.
decomp_lessons: When a global appears to reference stage parameters but data-section size/layout does not fit a raw pointer, model the global as a small store/wrapper with a params pointer plus padding if the binary evidence supports it.
Distinguish between the global storage object and the parameter struct it points to; this can be necessary for .sbss/.bss/data section matching.

Field names should be derived from use sites: values passed to HSD_Randi as a bound can justify a spawn-chance style name, while values copied into timer-like ground state can justify a camera_timer name when supported by local behavior.

A decomp PR can materially improve data matching even when nearby functions remain fuzzy; record the remaining fuzzy percentages to prevent future reviewers from assuming the change solved all matching issues.
naming_conventions: Stage-specific structs use the grZebesRoute_ prefix, as in grZebesRoute_Params and grZebesRoute_ParamStore.
Global symbols retain the existing decomp address-style stage symbol name grZe_Route_804D6A60.
Previously anonymous fields x0 and x4 were replaced with purpose-oriented snake_case names camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance.
The wrapper object is named ParamStore, while the pointed-to gameplay parameter block is named Params, making storage indirection explicit.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a wrapper struct with pointer-plus-pad layout to model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as an 8-byte object and improve data-section matching.
Converted direct pointer dereferences from grZe_Route_804D6A60->field to grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->field, preserving the semantic parameter access while matching the actual global storage.
Verification commands reported in the PR were `ninja build/GALE01/src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.o build/GALE01/report.json` and `ninja`.
Reported match state after the change: grzebesroute data sections are 100%, TU fuzzy remains 99.98663%, and grZebesRoute_8020B548 remains 99.96923%.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
One issue comment/body-style text provided the summary, verification commands, and match notes; no reviewer-requested changes were available as evidence.
searchable_terms: gr: fix Zebes Route param store
follow_up_queries: Find other ground stage files where a stage parameter global is modeled as a raw pointer but may actually be a pointer-plus-padding store.
Investigate remaining fuzzy mismatch in grZebesRoute_8020B548 at 99.96923%.
Search for other uses of Ground_801C49F8() to compare stage parameter storage patterns.
Check whether grZebesRoute_ParamStore.pad can be understood or named from future evidence.
